zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Talbot於1150年出生在英國賀福爾布洛米亞德時，他的父親Richard de Talbot II29歲，母親Joan de Bulmer20歲。他於1179年與Ann Villiers在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1231年2月13日之前在英國賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Talbot于1150年出生在英国賀福爾布洛米亞德时，他的父亲Richard de Talbot II29岁，母亲Joan de Bulmer20岁。他于1179年与Ann Villiers在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1231年2月13日之前在英国賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Talbot was born in 1150, in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard de Talbot II, was 29 and his mother, Joan de Bulmer, was 20. He married Ann Villiers in 1179, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 13 February 1231, in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Talbot est né en 1150, à Bromyard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Talbot II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bulmer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Ann Villiers en 1179, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 13 février 1231, à Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Talbot 1150 in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Talbot II 29 und seine Mutter Joan de Bulmer 20. Er hat 1179 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Ann Villiers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 13. Februar 1231 in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Talbot è nato il nel 1150 nel Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Talbot II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Bulmer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Ann Villiers nel 1179, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 13 febbraio 1231, nel Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Talbotが1150年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブロムヤルドで生まれた時，父Richard de Talbot IIは29歳，母Joan de Bulmerは20歳であった。1179年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでAnn Villiersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1231年2月13日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエククレスワルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Talbot(이)가 1150년 영국 허퍼드실르 브로미아어드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Talbot II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Bulmer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Ann Villiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1231년 2월 13일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 치레스월에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Talbot nasceu em 1150, em Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Talbot II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Bulmer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Villiers em 1179, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 13 de fevereiro de 1231, em Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Talbot родился в 1150 г. в местности бромярд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Talbot II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bulmer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Villiers в 1179 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 13 февраль 1231 г. в местности экклесвалл, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Talbot nació en 1150, en Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Talbot II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan de Bulmer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Ann Villiers en 1179, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 13 de febrero de 1231, en Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
